job_description: Tenant reported weak airflow from rooftop unit serving third floor offices.
notes: Simple airflow issue with low parts cost.

job_description: Customer reported rattling noise from ceiling-mounted HVAC unit during startup.
Kitchen area AC unable to maintain temperature during afternoon peak hours.
notes: Higher uncertainty due to kitchen heat load.

job_description: Rooftop unit fan not spinning. Technician found failed condenser fan motor.
Warehouse cooling system blowing warm air. Leak suspected but not confirmed.
notes: Human review recommended due to possible leak.

job_description: Clinic rooms overheating due to unresponsive thermostat controls.
Preventive maintenance found worn belt on rooftop air handler.
Classroom wing had uneven airflow caused by blocked return grille and dirty filters.
AC compressor was humming but not starting. Failed capacitor found.
Restaurant reported loud rattling from blower assembly during operation.
notes: Noise issue with moderate inspection time.

job_description: Large office suite reported commercial AC running continuously with poor cooling.
parts_used: Coil cleaning; filter replacement; refrigerant check
notes: Two technicians needed due to rooftop access.

job_description: Common area air handler had intermittent blower operation.
Warehouse HVAC unit making squealing noise on startup.
Clinic AC cooling dropped over several days. Refrigerant level low and leak suspected.
notes: Requires human review because leak repair scope is uncertain.

job_description: Retail floor had weak airflow and visible dust around vents.
Rooftop unit failed to start. Technician identified failed contactor.
Restaurant AC stopped cooling. Evaporator coil found frozen due to restricted airflow.
parts_used: Filter replacement; coil thaw; system test
notes: Could indicate deeper airflow or refrigerant issue.

job_description: Several classrooms were too cold due to incorrect zone thermostat readings.
Warehouse exhaust fan stopped working. Failed motor confirmed.
notes: Higher quote due to labor and two-person work.

job_description: Scheduled quarterly maintenance for rooftop commercial HVAC system.
notes: Good baseline for routine commercial service.
